hero.headline: Websites built to earn their keep.
hero.subhead: From A/Z is a small, independent studio building custom-coded sites for venues, hospitality, and ambitious brands. Launched in five days. Trusted across the UK, Europe, and beyond.

problem.eyebrow: THE REAL COST OF A SLOW WEBSITE
problem.headline: Your website is either your best employee — or an expensive ghost.
problem.line1: A site built five years ago won't rank where today's buyers are looking.
problem.line2: A booking form buried three clicks deep doesn't convert — it loses.
problem.line3: Paid traffic sent to a page that wasn't built to sell is money set on fire.

col1.title: Hand-coded. No templates. No bloat.
col1.body: Every site is written from scratch in modern frameworks. 100/100 Lighthouse scores. Loads in under a second. Delivered in five working days.

col2.title: Rank where your buyers are already searching.
col2.body: Technical SEO, local schema, keyword-led content, and monthly reporting. We stop treating SEO like guesswork.

col3.title: Turn your site into a system that sells.
col3.body: Booking bots, automatic review requests, lead qualification, and AI-drafted follow-ups. You stop answering the same enquiry twice.

client.headline: One founder. Three businesses. Same standard.
client.intro: The kind of trust we build shows up as repeat work. We're the long-term digital partner for the Majhen family portfolio — an event venue, a high-end custom automotive brand, and a commemorative publication. Three completely different audiences. One coherent standard of execution.

project1.title: Rebuilt. Rebooked.
project1.body: Full website rebuild and ongoing Instagram management. Monthly booking enquiries rose by double digits within the first 90 days of launch — and the growth has held.

project2.title: A digital identity worthy of the builds.
project2.body: Full digital brand and scroll-animated site for 1of1, Slovenia's luxury automotive customization atelier. Launching Q2 2026.

project3.title: A life worth remembering. A book that proves it.
project3.body: Digital platform and creative direction for 'Toni Bi Poznal Naslov Te Knjige' — a tribute to Anton Majhen. Personal stories, reflections, and a legacy preserved in print.

growth.headline: A fast site is an asset that grows over time.
growth.sub: Drag the slider to see how conversion-optimized speed compounds your revenue over 12 months compared to a slow, legacy site.
growth.label: Time (Months)

process.headline: From first call to live site in six working days.

step1.title: Audit.
step1.body: A 15-minute call. We pinpoint exactly what's costing you bookings or sales today.

step2.title: Brief.
step2.body: Brand, tone, structure, goals — locked in one document. No endless back-and-forth.

step3.title: Build.
step3.body: Hand-coded, SEO-ready, AI-enhanced where it matters.

step4.title: Launch.
step4.body: Deployed, tracked, and handed over with a short walkthrough video.

pricing.headline: Transparent pricing. No discovery theatre.
pricing.footnote: Selective intake. Maximum three new clients per month. Prices in GBP.

tier1.name: Starter
features: Custom-coded single-page or small multi-page site

tier3.name: Scale
features: AI booking bot or lead qualifier

about.headline: A small studio. A high standard.
about.p1: From A/Z is an independent studio operating across the UK, Europe, and beyond. We build the kind of websites we'd want for our own businesses — fast, honest, and designed to generate revenue, not admiration.
about.p2: Our name reflects how we work: we take a brand from A to Z — from the first idea to the launched, indexed, converting site. We stay lean on purpose. One codebase. One standard. No account managers, no outsourced work, no bloat.

cta.headline: If your website isn't bringing in bookings or customers, let's fix that this month.
cta.sub: Reply within one working day. No obligation.

footer.tagline: Operating across the UK & Europe · Clients worldwide

seo.title: From A/Z — Custom-coded websites for venues & hospitality
seo.description: An independent studio building fast, custom-coded websites for venues, hospitality, and ambitious local brands. Launched in 5 days.
seo.keywords: web design uk, custom nextjs websites, hospitality web design, venue booking systems, high performance websites, web design europe
